results.rendered_html:
parāhan 2 P.
1 To strike or beat back, strike down, repulse, repel, overthrow, drive back; daivaṃ matpauruṣaparāhataṃ  Rām. 
2 To attack, assail; kaṭākṣaparāhataṃ vadanapaṃkajaṃ  Māl. 7. 
3 To dash against, strike.
